articles.title: FSB Prevents Massive Ukrainian FPV Drone Attack on Russian Airfields
articles.excerpt: The Russian Federal Security Service (FSB) said on Monday that it had prevented a large-scale attack by Ukraine using FPV drones on Russian military air bases Ukrainka and Shagol in the Amur and Chelyabinsk regions.
articles.content: The Russian Federal Security Service (FSB) said on Monday that it had prevented a large-scale attack by Ukraine using FPV drones on Russian military air bases Ukrainka and Shagol in the Amur and Chelyabinsk regions.

articles.title: South Africa Plans First Strategic Oil Boost Since Apartheid Era
articles.excerpt: South Africa plans to increase its strategic oil reserves for the first time since the apartheid government stockpiled crude, adding to measures across the continent to mitigate supply shocks.
